case_title: AETNA FINANCE COMPANY, INC. DBA ITT FINANCIAL VS ROBERTS AUDREY ANN

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AETNA FINANCE COMPANY, INC. DBA ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES #5 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBERTS AUDREY ANN $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $51.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,551.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED
ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS SENT TO ROBERTS AUDREY RETURNED, FORWARDING ORDER EXPIRED.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AETNA FINANCE COMPANY, INC. DBA ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES #5 AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERTS AUDREY ANN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-08-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-16-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 04 TRIAL OF MAR-08-1991 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
